name: Data Governance
description: Enterprise data assets, quality rules, policies & access governance

workflows.name: Quality Issues Closure Timestamp
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete" label="Closed" value="@values['Status'] == 'Closed' || @values['Status'] == 'Complete' || @values['Status'] == 'Resolved'">utilities_echo_v1_1</task><task type="Complete" label="Not Closed" value="@values['Status'] != 'Closed' && @values['Status'] != 'Complete' && @values['Status'] != 'Resolved'">utilities_echo_v1_2</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Closure" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="100" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">quality issues closed on <%= @form['Name'] %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %> by <%= @submission['Updated By'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task><task name="Skip" id="utilities_echo_v1_2" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="350" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">quality issues updated, not closed</parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

forms.name: Access Requests
forms.description: Data access request and approval workflow

workflows.name: Access Requests Submitted Validation
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task label="" value="" type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Submission" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">access requests submitted on <%= @form['Name'] %> by <%= @submission['Created By'] %>: <%= @values.map{|k,v| k.to_s + '=' + v.to_s}.join(', ') %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Access Requests Status Logger
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete" label="Closed" value="@values['Status'] == 'Closed'">utilities_echo_v1_1</task><task type="Complete" label="Not Closed" value="@values['Status'] != 'Closed'">utilities_echo_v1_2</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Closure" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="100" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">access requests closed on <%= @form['Name'] %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %> by <%= @submission['Updated By'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task><task name="Log Status" id="utilities_echo_v1_2" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="350" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">access requests status: <%= @values['Status'] %> (was: <%= @values_previous['Status'] %>) by <%= @submission['Updated By'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

forms.name: Activity Log
forms.description: Immutable audit trail for governance actions

workflows.name: Auto Timestamp
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task label="" value="" type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Created" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">Record created on <%= @form['Name'] %> (<%= @kapp['Slug'] %>) at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %> by <%= @submission['Created By'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Submission Notification
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task label="" value="" type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Format Notification" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">New submission on <%= @form['Name'] %> (<%= @kapp['Slug'] %>) by <%= @submission['Created By'] %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>
